title: Fix Production Salesforce Invalid URI Login Error
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want the Salesforce login to work correctly in production, so that I can authenticate and access my data dictionary.
description:
Production Salesforce OAuth login was returning an invalid URI error. The root cause was incorrect callback URLs configured in the Salesforce Connected App settings.

### Resolution
- Removed `https://app.datatoolspro.com/` from callback URLs
- Removed `https://app.datatoolspro.com/index.php` from callback URLs
- After propagation delay (~1 day), the OAuth flow resumed working
acceptance_criteria: Salesforce OAuth login works in production without URI errors
Callback URLs are correctly configured in Salesforce Connected App
implementation_notes: Fix was in Salesforce Connected App configuration, not application code. Required removing stale callback URLs. Changes took ~1 day to propagate.
comment_summary: Waqar removed incorrect callback URLs from Salesforce settings. After a propagation delay the OAuth flow started working again.
